You're in control
Walk away at any step. No pressure.

HOW IT WORKS

FOUR STEPS, NO SURPRISES

Inspection. Documentation. Insurance navigation. Build. Each step photographed and explained.

1
Free Inspection: We come out, walk the roof, and photograph every detail. You get a written report the same week.
2
Documentation: Every measurement, every finding, every photo, organized for your records and your insurance file.
3
Insurance Navigation: We meet with your adjuster on-site and advocate for the full scope your policy covers.
4
Build + Warranty: Local crews. Manufacturer-spec install. We stand behind the warranty after the trucks leave the driveway.

You are in control at every step. No pressure, no obligation, no surprise charges.

KNOWLEDGE & ADVICE

ROOFING TIPS FOR DALLAS-FORT WORTH METROPLEX HOMEOWNERS

Plain-spoken guidance from local crews who walk these roofs every week.

May 2026 · Storm Damage

How to Spot Hail Damage on Your Roof

Most hail damage in DFW is invisible from the driveway. You can stand in your front yard, look at the roof, and see nothing. Forty-eight hours later your ceiling has a stain. The damage was always there. You just needed to know where to look.

Read More
May 2026 · Insurance Claims

When (and When Not) to File a Roofing Insurance Claim

A homeowner insurance claim is a decision with consequences beyond the immediate cheque. File the right claim, you get a new roof for the cost of a deductible. File the wrong claim, you raise your premium or worse, you get non-renewed at next policy renewal. Most DFW homeowners do not know the difference. Here is how we think about it.

Read More
May 2026 · Storm Damage

Storm Chasers vs Local Roofers: How to Tell the Difference

After every major DFW hail event, the trucks roll in. Out-of-state plates. Magnet signs. Door-knockers on the porch within 48 hours. Some of them are honest. Most are not. The hard part for a homeowner is knowing which is which before the deposit cheque clears.

Read More
